7.note: Schwalbe revenue $16-59M (sources vary, using LeadIQ high)

46.note: UPDATED: Lezyne 的 Clik support 本質上是「預裝轉接頭在充氣頭上」，不是重新設計打氣筒。Lezyne 是台中的貿易商（外國人+台灣老婆）。Clik valve 仍然需要轉接頭。CoreCap 的「不需任何轉接頭」優勢仍然成立。原始數據: Clik 5 brands (Lezyne native, WolfTooth native, Topeak/Silca adapter, Schwalbe native)。
46.changeReason: downgrade Lezyne from 'native redesign' to 'pre-mounted adapter' — insider intel

45.note: DT Swiss + Mavic 2026: both still standard Presta tubeless valves. Mavic UST system unchanged. Hunt: no info. No wheelset brand has adopted Clik or CoreCap as standard. Window still open.

f2.note: Clik pump head wear-out ~8 months (Singletrack forum). 30% friction severity.

29.note: Bike24.com SKU depth: CoreCap 13 SKUs (BTI-165 6色 + BTI-166 3長度×2色 + tool), Clik 10 SKUs (3 conversion kits + 3 tubeless lengths + DV variants)

30.note: Bike24 stockout: CoreCap RED (BTI-165) OUT OF STOCK, rest in stock. 1/13=8% OOS. Clik: all 10 SKUs status unknown (no stock indicator in search results).
30.changeReason: initial — CoreCap red OOS is demand signal

5.note: Bike24 review count (proxy for overall review signal): CoreCap BTI-165 red = 3 reviews, 4.67★. Amazon direct fetch blocked. Clik: no Bike24 reviews visible.

27.note: CoreCap retailers found: Bike24(DE), R2-Bike(DE), Bike-Discount(DE?), Windwave/JEJames/Merlin(UK), CCACHE(EU), Amazon.com(US), BBB official(NL). Clik: Bike24(DE), Amazon.de(DE), Amazon.com(US), bike-components.de(DE). CRC/Wiggle: neither listed. CoreCap NOT available in North America (per Escape Collective).

28.note: BBB official says 'visit your local dealer'. BBB Cycling Owler shows global presence but CoreCap is new. Schwalbe has massive existing dealer network but Clik is aftermarket add-on.

33.note: CoreCap launched Q4 2025/Q1 2026, ~3 months on market. Clik launched Q2 2025, ~10 months. Both still being stocked = positive retention signal.

17.note: No confirmed 2026 complete bikes with Clik pre-installed found in search. Schwalbe plans 2026 high-end, 3-5yr mid-range. DT Swiss not converted. Still in aftermarket/conversion kit phase.

12.note: Rough estimate from search results. CoreCap: BikeRadar, Bikerumor, Pinkbike, road.cc, 3bikes.fr, CycleTechReview, Muddymoles, NewAtlas = ~8 major reviews. Clik: more coverage due to earlier launch + Eurobike buzz = ~15.

19.note: N.S.-LIN 有氣嘴底部六角孔專利。Lezyne 為了閃這個專利，把六角孔改成星星孔。代表 CoreCap 有專利護城河。

f3.note: Clik valve 還是需要轉接頭（連 Lezyne 都只是預裝轉接頭）。CoreCap 用 Schrader 通用，完全不需要任何轉接頭。50% friction severity — 消費者需要額外購買或確認相容性。

56.note: Schwalbe 已推出 10 款 Clik 介面內胎 (SCV butyl tubes No. 3,4,6,7,10,12,13,15,17,19)。Bike24 有售。Schwalbe 官方確認「Numerous butyl tubes with CLIK VALVE are now available」。這是 Clik 最大的隱藏量體 — 全球每年賣出數億條內胎，Schwalbe 正在逐步切換。CoreCap: 0 (只做 tubeless valve，不做內胎)。
56.changeReason: CRITICAL finding — tube interface rollout is Clik's real volume play

41.note: Reserve Fillmore: NOT discontinued, still widely sold (BIKE24, Jenson, Amazon). Santa Cruz bikes still ship with Fillmore. This is the incumbent competitor — neither CoreCap nor Clik has displaced Fillmore in the MTB high-end segment.
41.changeReason: initial — Fillmore is the incumbent to beat
